FSG 入主8年，在轉會市場上所賺嘅錢同支出，今年係較活躍嘅一年 （截至20-7-18，source from Dailymail)

2011: Ins £109.95m - Outs £79.1m
= Net spend £20.8m
Incomings
Jordan Henderson, Charlie Adam, Stewart Downing, Jose Enrique, Sebastian Coates,
Craig Bellamy, Jordon Ibe, Luis Suarez, Andy Carroll

Outgoings
Paul Konchesky, Thomas Ince, Nabil El Zhar,
Daniel Ayala, Sotirios Kyrgiakos, Christian Poulson, Raul Miereles, David N'Gog, Ryan Babel, Fernando Torres

2012: Ins £30.23m - Outs £14.3m
= Net spend £15.93m
Incomings
Fabio Borini, Joe Allen, Oussama Assaidi, Daniel Sturridge, Philippe Coutinho

Outgoings
Fabio Aurelio, Dirk Kuyt, Maxi Rodriguez, Alberto Aquilani, Craig Bellamy, Charlie Adam, Joe Cole, Christian Doni

2013: Ins £65.3m - Outs £28.7m
= Net spend £36.6m

Incomings
Mamadou Sakho, Thiago Ilori, Iago Aspas, Luis Alberto, Simon Mignolet, Kolo Toure

Outgoings
Stewart Downing, Jay Spearing, Jonjo Shelvey, Andy Carroll

2014: Ins £116.85m - Outs £72.875m
= Net spend £43.975m

Incomings
Rickie Lambert, Emre Can, Adam Lallana, Lazar Markovic, Dejan Lovren, Divock Origi, Javer Manquillo, Alberto Moreno, Mario Balotelli

Outgoings
Luis Suarez,Conor Coady, Pepe Reina, Martin Kelly, Jack Robinson, Daniel Agger, Oussama Assaidi, Suso

2015: Ins £88.5m - Outs £76.02m
= Net spend £12.48m

Incomings
Christian Benteke, Roberto Firmino, Nathaniel Clyne, Joe Gomez, Allan Rodrigues, James Milner, Danny Ings, Adam Bogdan, Marko Grujic

Outgoings
Raheem Sterling, Fabio Borini, Iago Aspas, Rickie Lambert, Sebastian Coates, Glen Johnson, Steven Gerrard, Brad Jones, Javier Manquillo

2016: Ins £69m - Outs £86.5m
= Net spend £17.5m

Incomings
Joel Matip, Loris Karius, Sadio Mane, Alex Manninger, Ragnar Klavan, Georginio Wijnaldum

Outgoings
Joao Teixeira, Jerome Sinclair, Sergi Canos, Jordon Ibe, Martin Srktel, Joe Allen, Brad Smith, Christian Benteke, Luis Alberto,Mario Balotelli

2017: Ins £88.9m - Outs £47.25m
= Net spend £41.65m

Incomings
Mohamed Salah - £39m
Alex Oxlade-Chamberlain - £35m,
Andrew Robertson £8m, Tony Gallacher , Dom Solanke

Outgoings
Andre Wisdon , Lucas Leiva, Kevin Stewart, Mamadou Sakho, Alex Manninger, Cameron Brannagan

2018: Ins: £252.75m (Including Van Dijk and Keita) - Outs: £145m = Net spend £107.75m

Incomings
Virgil van Dijk - £75m
Alisson - £65m
Naby Keita £55m
Fabinho £44m
Xherdan Shaqiri £13.75m

Outgoings
Philippe Coutinho, Emre Can
